scrapedName: Nha Trang Golf & Coastal Bliss 5 days

itinerary.title: Nha Trang Arrival
itinerary.description: Upon arrival at Cam Ranh International Airport, you will be welcomed by our guide. After a short meet-and-greet, the driver will transfer you to your hotel in Nha Trang. Once you reach the hotel, you will complete the check-in process and take some time to relax. You can unwind in the comfort of your room, explore amenities, or take a stroll along the nearby beach to soak in the fresh ocean breeze.

itinerary.title: Golf at Diamond Bay Golf Resort
itinerary.description: Get ready to enjoy a full day of golf at a premium resort. After a delicious breakfast at your hotel, we will take you to Diamond Bay Golf Resort. This is an 18-hole, par 72 course that introduces a perfect challenge for golfers of all levels and promises to be an ideal venue for those who want to captivate themselves in nature and stunning seascapes. You will have ample time here to play your game and enjoy the surroundings. Following that, you will return to your hotel, where you can relax and reflect on a super active day.

itinerary.title: Free Day To Relax
itinerary.description: You will start your morning with breakfast at the hotel before relaxing and exploring in your own way. This is your chance to get to know the attractiveness of Nha Trang, including beaches, culture, and activities. You can take a slow walk along Tran Phu Beach and feel the soft sand beneath your feet. For those who love the idea of having fun in a different place, try an island-hopping excursion to Hon Mun, Hon Tam, or Diep Son. If relaxation is your priority, it is recommended that you head to Thap Ba Hot Springs and have a rejuvenating mud bath

itinerary.title: Golf in Vinpearl Golf Club
itinerary.description: Having finished eating breakfast, you make your way to Vinpearl Golf Resort, one of the best golf destinations located on Hon Tre Island. Designed by IMG, this masterpiece offers an impressive 18-hole course, setting against a breathtaking backdrop of mature trees and wetlands. Once at the resort, you will have time to warm up before going to the first tee. Whether you are looking to improve your swing or appreciate the peaceful atmosphere, every moment on the course will be a memorable one. Wrapping up your time on the greens, you will be transferred back to your hotel for the next schedule.

itinerary.title: Nha Trang Departure
itinerary.description:
As usual, you will enjoy your breakfast at the hotel, but since it is the last day, you will pack your things for your departure. Make sure to bring wonderful memories of perfect swings, spectacular landscapes, and relaxing moments by the beach with you when leaving Nha Trang

We hope to welcome you again for another exciting golf adventure!

highlights: Embark on a golf tour in a beautiful coastal setting and at a luxurious resort
Discover the beauty of Nha Trang with free time to visit the beach or local attractions.
Enjoy stress-free transfers and comfortable stays at top hotels
Ideal for golf lovers and nature enthusiasts with relaxation and adventure at the same time
included: Golf rate applied for 01 golfer play 18 holes include: Green fee, caddie fee & ½ buggy fee
Overnight in shared Twin/ Double  room with Air-condition (AC) at hotel.
All transport during the tour on air-conditioned vehicle as per itinerary (including airport pick up & see off)
Meals as indicated in the program
importantNotes: PROGRAMS & SCHEDULES SUBJECT TO CHANGE WITHOUT PRIOR NOTICE
